523b948f346238e41d007555_154: The boss is the reason we’re still alive, Eiger.
523cb418346238d026006192_301: Look. I'm about to tell you some things about myself that might change your opinion of me. It's entirely possible that you're going to hate me based on what's coming up next. I've accepted that, and if that's what happens, I sincerely believe that I deserve it.
525add9b3030315c17005fce_8: This facility is already on high alert. These disguises aren't going to help us.
5266eef4663661b825002e69_51: The boss went to the trouble of fetching everything. Let them do the honors.
52953f9b636134f028000f21_18: Remember, this is a dragon. Be careful.
52b4e06e64343172ad639884_5: Don't worry, Dietrich. We'll get this over with as quickly as we can. In the meantime, perhaps we should work out what we're going to do about APEX. While the boss and I are indisposed, the rest of you can start gearing up for the assault.
52d5d21e323437a012004f71_21: I have some personal business to attend to. There's a man that I need to find... a vicious, repulsive monster who needs to be brought to justice. The boss knows what I'm talking about.
530036f4346238d8190033b4_2: You got us through the night alive. Well done.
530036f4346238d8190033b4_33: It is. But only for a while. Your friendship means a lot to me. The team may be breaking up, but this isn't that. I wouldn't be leaving if I didn't have to, and I fully intend to come back.
530036f4346238d8190033b4_34: It is. But only for a while. Your friendship means a lot to me. This team means a lot. I wouldn't be leaving if I didn't have to, and I fully intend to come back.
53582818303031440600692f_20: It matters because it's solid evidence that we're doing the right thing. Even if Harrow does escape, he won't be as much of a threat as we thought he was. I just wanted the boss to know that.
53582818303031440600692f_23: Calm down, Marta. You know that I agree with you in principle... I have more reason to hate Harrow than anybody. But I have reason to suspect that he isn't the real power here anymore.
53582818303031440600692f_24: My friend here is right, Marta. I want to save these kids. I do. But even if we do, they'll come out of this damaged, like I am. I didn't want to admit it, not even to myself. But this has to come to an end. And it won't be over until Harrow is dead.
53582818303031440600692f_43: If you want your precious Harrow to survive the night, shut up and stop arguing with me. What I'm trying to say is that I disagree with my friend here. If Harrow isn't the real threat here, then we shouldn't prioritize killing him - we should try to rescue the cultists instead.
523b948f346238e41d007555_162: I’ve got the skill and experience to lead this team. The rookie, on the other hand, was appointed by Monika as a joke.
523cb4ff346238d026006513_110: Tell me: which would you rather be?
523cb4ff346238d026006513_177: Giving you command of this team was a hasty decision, made for the wrong reasons. I stand by that assessment. But between then and now, I've been watching you like a hawk. And you've grown.
523cb4ff346238d026006513_303: I have to stop him, before it's too late. What happened to that town... it can't be allowed to happen again in Schattennest.
523cb4ff346238d026006513_332: We've got a full plate. I know that. But listen... we can't afford to ignore this. If we do, the Kreuzbasar that we know today will be gone within a year. I promise you that.
52b4e4af64343172ad639989_8: The boss has him under control. Dante performed well in the field. Followed commands flawlessly. I have no concerns.
52d5d21e323437a012004f71_5: The boss is right. A good runner knows that the run she's on is never what it seems. We’re “deniable assets” to our employers. Disposable goods. It's on us to succeed in spite of that.
53003713346238d8190033bd_0: I'll admit it... you did a hell of a good job back there. I couldn't've done better myself.
5356d86b323437d02500679a_34: Do me a favor. Sweep the building for intel - anything that we might have missed on the way in.
5356d86b323437d02500679a_176: All right... but be quick. And boss?
5356dea16361341c15001aa7_2: You could say that. This is Bannik. He's a friend.
5356dea16361341c15001aa7_33: All right, hotshot. I get it, you're wiz. Just do me a favor and keep the damn bag closed, okay?
52336c1638336110170073fa_150: No problem, chief! Not a problem at all. You can count on me! Now, if you'll excuse me, I've got some last-minute stuff to take care of before we get started. Oh, and chief... thanks.
5359c7ad373937e81a004d00_6: Please. Chief. Just trust me on this. And, uh... make sure that Hasenkamp comes with you. We've gotta make sure that box makes it back to Grinder.
5359c8b7373937e81a004d1a_2: Well, you're half right. The chief is almost out. You, on the other hand, won't ever leave this building, you son of a bitch.
5359c8b7373937e81a004d1a_7: I wouldn't, if I were you. The chief there can kill you with the press of a button.
5359c8b7373937e81a004d1a_10: Get this, chief: that son of a bitch isn't really an accountant. He's an assassin, and Grinder's second-in-command to boot. Making people disappear is his job, chief. No way Grinder would have sent him if he intended to let you walk out of there alive.
5359c8b7373937e81a004d1a_24: Actually, I think that the chief might be onto something. Plotz had personal information on all three of us, right? We were all marked "shoot on sight." But Grinder's name was conspicuously absent from that list.
5359c8b7373937e81a004d1a_26: Just think about it, man. The chief's name was on the list. So who the hell gave it to Plotz? Other than you, me, and Grinder, who even knew that they'd be coming here tonight?
5359c8b7373937e81a004d1a_63: I dunno, man. But one thing I can tell you: somebody gave Plotz that info on us. And the chief's name was on that list. Now, tell me: other than you, me, and Grinder, who even knew that they'd be coming here tonight? And why wasn't Grinder's name on Plotz's kill list?
523b948f346238e41d007555_90: I'm with the boss on this one. This is interesting... scary, even. But it doesn't actually change anything.
523b948f346238e41d007555_167: As for my part... the rookie saved our lives back there. You may not believe it, but they did. The way I see it, that means I follow their lead a while longer.
523cc440346238d0260069af_174: I don't care what anyone else tells you. You listen to me, boss: what you did, killin' that thing... it was the right call. Yeah, it cost us some nuyen. But letting that thing live would've been a travesty.
523cc440346238d0260069af_218: I don't care what anyone else tells you. You listen to me, boss: what you did, killin' that thing... it was the right call. Yeah, it cost us some nuyen. But letting that thing live would've been a travesty.

52449597346238a0240049c3_8: Look, Eiger. The boss is right. You weren't stuck in that basement with us. You don't know how things went down in there. So do us all a favor and shut it down, okay?
52449597346238a0240049c3_69: Ach, this is asinine. The boss did well in there, Eiger. You didn't see it, and I know you don't believe it, but they did. So do us all a favor and shut it down, okay?
52449597346238a0240049c3_71: Oh, shove off, Eiger. We were all on the lookout for physical security, the boss included. Throwing them under the bus isn't going to help anything.
52940263636134d43100009a_180: "Because I said so" doesn't cut it, Doc. Not when the stakes are this high. What the boss is sayin' makes sense, and you know it. You may be crazy, but you ain't stupid.
52b4e4af64343172ad639989_1: So…boss... Dante was very helpful out there… but… I am a bit concerned about his...
52d604ba6361342c3f0063f9_12: Because the world is sick. Anyone with half a brain can see that. So I'm gonna use the Doc's wonder bug to poison it back to health. It might get better, or it might die. Either would be better than it languishing like this.
53b9f7a63462385c1b00094a_30: Isn't it obvious? I want your help. I'm still alive, but only barely... I don't have the strength to do much myself any more, and Audran cannot handle this task on his own.

I can promise 500 nuyen - and if you can recover the shipment, I'll have some new gear on the shelf. Come see me for the details.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_127: WITHHELD We would like to arrange a meeting between you and one of our representatives. You will find him at the Cafe nearby - his name is Luca Duerr. He will be expecting you. Come alone.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_128: Em Dear friend, Please tell Lukas - excuse me, I mean "Blitz" - that I'm proud of him for not being an idiot.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_143: Alexander Hey. Uncle Dietrich told me that I could message you here, so I figured that I should. He probably told you that I'm living at Samuel's, huh? Well, that's where I am. It's different, I'll give it that much.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_505: [Yeah, it was. Thing is, I've read his arrest records. At the time that Lone Star tackled him, he was screaming crazy things... things about the world burning and a moon made of blood. So maybe there's something to all of this after all.] - ProShot
527abf9e636134b83400302e_512: [Looks like someone tried a good old-fashioned bank robbery out in Drogenkippe the other day... one of those old, defunded banks still had some funds in it, apparently. 527abf9e636134b83400302e_514: [Sounds like a revenge hit to me. What goes around comes around.] - Maelstrom
527abf9e636134b83400302e_515: [That tub of lard will keep the ghouls fed for a month.] - WraithLike44
527abf9e636134b83400302e_516: [Forget the ghouls, think of all those people who just had their credit restored! Free money!] - BlueBeerd
527abf9e636134b83400302e_517: [Looks like there was a good old-fashioned bank robbery out in Drogenkippe the other day... one of those old, defunded banks still had some funds in it, apparently. 527abf9e636134b83400302e_519: [They made the transfer though. Left the bankers in the lurch, there's no capitol left! Their whole operation is coming down around them!] - Maelstrom
527abf9e636134b83400302e_520: [I'm sure that's very comforting for them. Oh, no, wait, they're dead.] - WraithLike44
527abf9e636134b83400302e_521: [They made big bucks, man. In my book, that's a win, even if they did do it posthumously.] - ProShot
527abf9e636134b83400302e_522: [Looks like there's been a good old-fashioned bank heist in Drogenkippe! One of those old, defunded banks still had some funds in it, apparently. Whoever was responsible waltzed right in and transferred away a whole load of nuyen.] - Tolstoi
527abf9e636134b83400302e_524: [Huh. And I'd always assumed that banking was a boring job.] - ProShot
527abf9e636134b83400302e_525: [Sounds pretty action-packed to me. You've got a break-in, a big score, what looks like a revenge killing... all of that, plus a steady paycheck! What more could you want?] - Maelstrom
527abf9e636134b83400302e_526: [If you need me, I'll be putting in an application at my nearest savings & loan.] - ProShot
527abf9e636134b83400302e_527: [I’ve got solar panels like everybody, but does anyone have experience with these mana-turbine services? I’m off the grid, so there are some times when I need to do some late night decking, or maintenance on my telescoping limbs.] - AlanAltbit
527abf9e636134b83400302e_528: [Is that the thing where a mage comes by and drops some juice into a generator? My buddy was telling me about them last week. The turbine spins the mana around and the charge lasts for weeks, he said.] - WraithLike44
527abf9e636134b83400302e_529: [They’re a scam, chummer. That mage is going to be out of there with your money before you realize how much power you’ve actually got. You’re better off pedaling a bike-battery.] - Tolstoi
5238d732303031e016000264_0: I'm afraid that I have some bad news... the High Threat Response Team is on its way. It's only a matter of time before they close in on your position.
523b948f346238e41d007555_0: Welcome back. I have news for you.
523b948f346238e41d007555_28: Well. Our scarred friend makes an appearance. I suspect that Green Winters' predictions are coming true. I believe that Feuerschwinge is behind this.
523b948f346238e41d007555_74: I have new information. I'm afraid that the news isn't good.
523b948f346238e41d007555_102: A job well done, as usual... and the plan has worked swimmingly, I might add. I am already patched in to the Knight Errant comm system. If and when they summon their High Threat Response Team, I will know it.
523b948f346238e41d007555_147: That said, we believe that Monika’s friend is the right choice to lead the team.
523b948f346238e41d007555_170: Monika’s friend will take her place as the leader of this team.
523b948f346238e41d007555_194: You should probably be getting ready for your trip to Das Kesselhaus... time is short.
523b948f346238e41d007555_263: What can I do for you?
523f37cb303031540c003c07_0: Well, it couldn't last forever. It looks as though the Azzies have sorted out that overload that you fed into their power grid. Watch your step, my friend. 523f37cb303031540c003c07_2: Well, it couldn't last forever. It looks as though the Azzies have sorted out that overload that you fed into their power grid. 5266eef4663661b825002e69_21: Yes... our friend here is right. Finding Dr. Vauclair should be our priority. If we're going up against a dragon, we need to find ourselves a dragonslayer.
5266eef4663661b825002e69_48: Have you procured a DVD reader?
52a65dfa6636619427000342_1: I trust that I’m catching you at a good time?
5282af6b6361342453002bee_155: Nothing bad is going to happen to your chief, Blitz. Why would I hurt them? I need their help. Now shut your mouth and quit whining. Otherwise, I'm going to get irritated. Understand?
5282af6b6361342453002bee_157: Blitz. I am having a conversation, and I don't appreciate being interrupted. If you keep this up, I'm going to get irritated. So for the rest of this conversation, you keep your mouth shut. Understand?
5282af6b6361342453002bee_214: Why would you think that I'd want to frighten you? I promise you, my intentions are completely innocent. In fact, ace, I'm on your side.

52c74dbd6636616c27000046_138: Dragons do not hope, little one. That gift is for you alone.
52c74dbd6636616c27000046_142: I have been ripped from my body little one. Imprisoned in this girl, imprisoned in this cage. Tortured longer than the span of your entire lifetime. And I have been defiled. The green is defiled. Spoiled. There is no forever for me. Forever is dead.
52c74dbd6636616c27000046_160: If you release me, little one I will sleep the long sleep. I will begin again. In the next age of the world.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_133: Ah. I see. Very well, young one. I will tell you what I know.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_137: This is not a world of absolutes, young one. I would not call the Adversary "evil" any sooner than I would a more conventional totem, like Shark or Bear. All can be destructive, yes, and cruel. But none are intrinsically so.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_141: And now, young one, I have a question for you. No, not a question - a request. I would like you to tell me about your friend's "dealings" with the Adversary. And I would like you to be thorough.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_158: Did I say that? No, young one. If anything, I am saying that all belief systems are equally valid. After all, they are all different interpretations of the truth. And how can the truth be wrong?
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_164: You are most welcome, young one. Is there anything else that you need?
53b3571c3030317402003d8a_1: Um... hello? Are you the one I'm supposed to meet?
53d2d5ee3030316007006010_10: That's the first thing you've said that I think we all agree with. If we didn't need you to finish the run, I'll bet that the boss would've beaten the tar out of you already.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_32: Welcome back, and my congratulations on a job well done.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_66: The loss of a single chapterhouse isn't going to make a dent in Humanis' strength in this city. In fact, Stahl's death will only make the rest of Humanis even more bloodthirsty. The fact that someone like you was responsible is just icing on the cake. They'll print up some new propaganda and paint themselves the victims.
52675434626164703000513a_1: Do not speak, just listen. I have a proposition for you.
526850b23030317c04005d4c_1: We have received reports that you may be headed into the Humanis compound. It is vital that their current leader remain unharmed. Other Humanis personnel are of little consequence... you may do with them what you will. But Volker Stahl is ours. Do not disappoint us.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_111: I would like to thank you for your continual assistance over the course of the past few weeks. Ascending the ladder of an organization like mine is never easy, but it's much simpler when an ally such as yourself volunteers to do the heavy lifting.
53e2c232303031081d007ffa_42: The job is done, I trust?
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_4: I am in your debt, noble adventurer. Thanks to you, my reign will be a long and joyous one.
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_7: Ah. The intrepid adventurer returns! What can I do for you?
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_10: Hail, noble adventurer! Bringer of good tidings and glorious adventure! What news of your quest?
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_58: Back down? Back down?! You have invaded my home, adventurer! My peasantry lies dead at your hands! As a matter of honor, I must confront you!
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_1: The savior of our people. What can I do for you, mein Freund?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_2: You'll have to excuse me... I don't have much time. Several of my volunteers are still missing, and while their odds of survival are vanishingly low, I must assist in the search. At the very least we can recover their bodies.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_9: When the attackers came, we all took refuge in the Civic Center that bears your name. Its strong walls and sturdy gate kept us all safe from harm. Had our people been on the street... had they been in our old building, which came under fire during the attack... none of them would be alive.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_13: Guten Tag, brother. Is there something that I can do for you?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_57: Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward leasing the building. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 500 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_60: Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward purchasing the trode nets. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 400 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_63: Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward stocking our library's shelves with books. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 350 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_72: I don't know what to say. With this donation, we have reached our final goal. I will speak with Burakgazi immediately and provide him his downpayment. The Civic Center will bear your name, and it will stand as a monument to your generosity and care. Thank you, once again. You have been a godsend to the poor of the Kreuzbasar, and I will see to it that they know it.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_74: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 500 nuyen goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_80: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 400 nuyen goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_84: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 350 nuyen goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_88: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 250 nuyen goal.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_120: Guten Tag, sister. Is there something that I can do for you?

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_1: Do not mock this one, Aljernon Half-Dream. But nor should you praise them, either. For good or ill, the cycle of a Great Wyrm has ended. Never again will she walk upon this Earth, nor soar over its mountains. This day is full of portent.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_12: Where the Half-Dream goes, you cannot follow.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_23: To be certain. This one is to be heralded with much praise, Aljernon Half-Dream, though their release of the Great Wyrm will have ramifications, to be sure. This day is full of portent.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_42: Do not simply dismiss this one, Aljernon Half-Dream. You are wiser than that, and they have proven their worth more than once. Here we have a firsthand account of the Feuerschwinge Wyrm and what became of her. Shall we remain ignorant or shall we listen?
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_63: Do not simply dismiss this one, Aljernon Half-Dream. You are wiser than that, and they have proven their worth more than once. Here, we have a firsthand account of the Feuerschwinge Wyrm and what became of her. Shall we remain ignorant, or shall we listen?
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_68: And? What has become of the Great Wyrm?
523c8e98346238e41d008a36_44: I have seen what they will do when this world has run its course. They will rip the guts from your dying civilization, and they will feast upon your screams.
523c8e98346238e41d008a36_65: Do you feel thirsty? I do... parched, in fact. It happened when you walked through the door. I could really go for a cold one.
523c8e98346238e41d008a36_68: When you speak with the men-who-are-not-men, the fleshy puppets imprisoned behind glass, you must remember that they dream. They may not be real people by your definition of the term, but they do have dreams. That alone makes them worth saving.
523c8e98346238e41d008a36_69: A pleasure, as always. What can I do for you?

53e3fba73030318c1f0077be_0: Unbelievable. We have one job to do in this place, and our fearless leader wants to bail before we've done it. Get your ass back here, "team leader." We still have a penthouse to bug, remember?
5260599e303031cc10006e09_31: Best of luck with that. Even as we speak, loyal Soldiers of Humanity are converging on this position. Get ready to die, mongrel.
5260599e303031cc10006e09_40: It's a little late for that, mongrel. You've just brought me the last of what I need. 523b9421346238e41d00754c_0: My friend. I'm glad to see that you made it through the attack. Not all of mine were so lucky.
523b9421346238e41d00754c_4: My friend. It does me good to know that you're still fightin' the good fight. You just tell me what you need, and my boys'll go fetch it for you.
523b9421346238e41d00754c_49: T'aven baxtale, stranger. You're here to conduct some business? If so, I welcome you to Mettbach Arms and Ammunition. If not, keep right on walking.
